title: OYO Rooms Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: OYO Rooms Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms Digital Technologies family as a E-commerce Executive in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms Digital Technologies:
OYO Rooms Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms Digital Technologies!
